case_title: WESTERN MART CO., A CA. vs. MARINA'S MUEBLES, INC. DBA SEGUSINO/MARINA'S et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WESTERN MART CO., A CA. GENERAL PARTNERSHIP, DBA SAN FRANCISCO MART RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARINA'S MUEBLES, INC. DBA SEGUSINO/MARINA'S A CA. CORP. GARCIA, ANTONIO ZARAIN AN IND. AND GUARANTOR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1355 MARKET STREET, FLOOR 8, SPACE 885, SF, CA $6,924.90 RENT, $850.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $355.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,129.90, LEASE FORFEITED, TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $8,129.90 DEDUCTED FROM SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $9,312.00 LEAVES A NET CREDIT OF $1,182.10. SEE JUDG- MENT AT LENGTH.
